verdict: 0 P0 / 3 P1 / 2 P2 — P1 > 2,修正後跑 round 2

findings.problem: PLAN 砍掉 design 的 formatValue 改直用 fmtAmount,但 fmtAmount 負值掉「元」分支,賣超欄格式跑不通
findings.resolution: accepted — formatValue = fmtAmount(abs) 薄 wrap 保留(design 對齊 + DRY 委派)+ 負值測試

findings.problem: stock_price_universe_day 宣稱間接覆蓋不成立(stub client + FAKE 繞過),URL/params 零覆蓋
findings.resolution: accepted — 加 request-shape 直測(monkeypatch _get 捕 params)

findings.problem: design R16 快照錯誤轉包 warrant_upstream 無紅測試
findings.resolution: accepted — B4 測項 12(httpx + HTTPException(404) 兩 case + FinMind 層放行)

findings.problem: E1 斷言凱基淨買只約束單 fixture,跨 fixture 聚合可能翻向
findings.resolution: accepted — 跨 fixture 同 broker 淨向一致約束 + B4 聚合 assert

findings.problem: no_volume 空態 + 顯式 date 的 no_trading_day 落點模糊
findings.resolution: accepted — flag 由 get_flow 回傳前統一貼 + 測項 9 sub-case
